articles.title: DuckDuckGo installs rise as users dislike Google's AI search.
articles.summary: DuckDuckGo sees a 30% rise in installs. Many users prefer it over Google's new AI search. They don't want AI 'force-fed' to them.
articles.impact: Users are actively choosing search engines that offer alternatives to AI-driven results.

articles.title: Windows 11 update brings noticeable speed boosts.
articles.summary: A new Windows 11 update is here. It offers significant performance improvements. Your PC will feel faster and more responsive.
articles.impact: This update aims to improve the daily user experience with a snappier and more efficient Windows 11.

articles.title: Apple Wallet's Digital ID now works for age verification.
articles.summary: Apple Wallet's Digital ID feature has expanded. It can now be used for age checks. This adds more practical uses for the app.
articles.impact: Apple is integrating more real-world verification functions directly into its Wallet app.

articles.title: PC makers are creating laptops to rival Apple's MacBook Neo.
articles.summary: Some PC makers are responding to Apple. They are making laptops to compete with the MacBook Neo. Affordable, good laptops are becoming more common.
articles.impact: The budget laptop market is heating up with new competition aimed at Apple's offerings.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro might get thicker, and that's a good thing.
articles.summary: The iPhone 18 Pro could be thicker. This follows a trend from the iPhone 17 Pro. The author is now in favor of thicker phones.
articles.impact: A shift towards slightly thicker iPhones might offer improved features despite previous trends.

articles.title: Capcom releases a demo for Resident Evil Requiem on Switch 2.
articles.summary: A demo for Resident Evil Requiem is out. It is available on the Switch 2. Players can try the early parts of the game.
articles.impact: This demo allows players to test the latest Resident Evil experience before its full release on Switch 2.

articles.title: PlayStation shuts down servers for Destruction AllStars.
articles.summary: PlayStation has ended support for Destruction AllStars. The game is no longer sold. Its online servers have been shut down.
articles.impact: The game's live-service model has concluded, removing its online functionality and availability.

articles.title: June 2026 Pokémon GO events announced.
articles.summary: Pokémon GO has announced its June events. Featured Pokémon include Kartana and Celesteela. There will be raids and Community Day.
articles.impact: Players can look forward to a month packed with new content and special events in Pokémon GO.
